name: expirymate-cloud
install: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.0 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @expirymate/shared build && pnpm db:generate
start: sudo service docker start || true; node scripts/cursor-cloud-env.mjs; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f .cursor/compose.postgres.yml up -d postgres || echo '[cursor-cloud] docker postgres skipped — set DATABASE_URL secret if needed'
